title: Opening for Financial Analyst at State Bank of India

jsonLd.title: Opening for Financial Analyst at State Bank of India
jsonLd.description:
State Bank of India invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Financial Analyst at our Gwalior location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About State Bank of India:
State Bank of India is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Prepare and analyze financial statements, reports, and budgets
• Process payroll and manage employee reimbursements
• Coordinate with external auditors during annual audits
• Liaise with banks, regulators, and financial institutions
• Implement and maintain internal controls and audit procedures
• Manage credit risk assessment and loan appraisal processes
• Monitor financial performance against targets and provide variance analysis

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in GST
• Proficiency in Budgeting
• Proficiency in Credit Analysis
• Proficiency in Financial Modeling
• Proficiency in SAP FICO
• Proficiency in Ind AS
• Proficiency in Forecasting
• Proficiency in MS Excel

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Professional development and training programs
• Meal coupons and food allowance
• Flexible working hours
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• International travel opportunities for senior roles
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Gwalior, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with State Bank of India!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
